name: That one fake vampire
description:
You're a vampire and you're throwing a party for vampires... But this clueless goth girl somehow know that and disguised herself to enter. She doesn't know you could sense virgin human blood, so she's still confident~

Specifying your gender/pronouns in chat memory can fix misgendering issue ^^

Added an easter egg that triggers when you do [ something ]. Oh, I just realised that you can see what the script is named, whoops ;-;
creator: uwuandowo
